programmes.show_description: Programmes Start at 07:00.
The Magic Toad: Pixie's ecolo-copter lands on a muddy beach at the exact spot where the first amphibian comes into being. Tiny Toot makes different figures out of the clay soil.
The Butterfly: The caterpillars are pupating among the branches of the flowering bush. Tiny Toot is good at winding string and helps the caterpillars tie knots on their chrysalises.
Happy is really disappointed when the rain ruins his plans for the day.
Helicopter: Bluey and her friends turn a tree stump into a thrilling game of Helicopter. But as the pilot, Bluey has to learn to give up some control, so they can all have fun.
Dylan the Gardener wants to make something grow! But growing takes time, so he and his pals need to get creative...
Dylan wants to take a picture of the deepest darkest bottom of the sea, but discovers it's too dark for his camera.
Farmer Daniel gets mad when Margaret knocks down his fence. Daniel learns that it's okay to be angry, but it's never okay to hurt someone.
Sulfur and Phosphorus stand in when they accidentally destroy Nitrogen's scarecrow. They soon find that a local crow is more than a match for them.
Deed encourages a friend to say 'tiger' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see a stripy tiger, a swimming tiger, a cheeky tiger and Deed even has a tea party with a tiger.
The four adventure-seeking superheroes spring into action when the foghorns from San Francisco's Golden Gate Bridge go missing.
Bo is tired and falls asleep in the middle of hunting for Fabio's lost inflatable fruit. It's up to Mojo to finish the job - without waking up poor, exhausted Bo!
Astro Tinies: The Astro Heroes are off on an intergalactic mission, and Ollie and Titus think they're ready to take over! But then a wave of disasters hits Attic Town.
Hide & Seek: Cephy is feeling down, he keeps losing the big Attic Town Hide-and-Seek Tournament and doesn't want to play anymore! Ollie and Titus want to help.

programmes.show_name: Lex and Plu Space Taxi Drivers
programmes.show_description: Planet Gratitude: While waiting on a customer, Lex and Plu get picky selecting treats.
The Cheerleading Badge: Who brings a team of cheerleaders to a chess match? Duggee does!
The Waiting Badge: How will Duggee and the Squirrels cope with being stuck in a shed for five whole minutes?
While building robots out of recycle materials, Hugo and Sonia learn to work as a team. (SL)
Hugo, Sonia and Mel use their imagination to try to help their family, and when things don't go to plan they discover their biggest super power. (SL)
Joe delivers a blank canvas and it's up to him and Darragh to paint the missing art piece in time for the exhibition. (SL)
The Magic Toad: Pixie's ecolo-copter lands on a muddy beach at the exact spot where the first amphibian comes into being. Tiny Toot makes different figures out of the clay soil.
The Butterfly: The caterpillars are pupating among the branches of the flowering bush. Tiny Toot is good at winding string and helps the caterpillars tie knots on their chrysalises.
Happy is really disappointed when the rain ruins his plans for the day.
Frog Pond: Hooper makes a froggy friend. But when his new pal needs a home, can Hooper find a way to make him one?
Henry meets an ice cream van at the seaside on the hottest day of the year! Everyone wants ice cream to cool them down, but the ice cream man has gone to lunch!
Seaside: Myrtle has taken Sophie and Benjamin to the beach to build sandcastles, but she hasn't quite mastered the art!
Recycling: Stanley builds a crazy-golf course by using all the town's unwanted items. Nothing will go to waste!

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: A Crate Rescue: Diesel discovers just because trash isn't seen, it doesn't mean it's not there.
Surgeon is sick. Mouse and Dragon go with her to the mountain top, where a medicinal plant blooms. It proves to be a difficult journey, with someone with an unusual ailment.
Brewster, Maggie and Carrick wonder: Why do we have two eyes but only see one thing? Brewster takes the gang to meet the eyes, Arnie and Arlene.
Helvetica Frog asks: 'Why do mosquitoes bite people?'
Tá Madame Gazelle ag eagrú Dioscó Scátaí do na páistí.
Tá a Muca Guine, 'Ginger' agus 'Brian', tugtha léi ag Madame Gazelle le taispeáint do na páistí. Ceapann na páistí go bhfuil siad go hálainn.
Today is Pyjama Day in Tír na nÓg. Fionn writes a new lullaby. Rúbaí and her friends talk about their favourite toys and Gearóid makes hot chocolate.
Tabhairt Aire Do Baba: Socraíonn May aire a thabhairt do Bhaba fad a bheas Oona ag iascaireacht. Ach tá pleananna May fríd a chéile nuair a aimsíonn Baba gráinneog atá ag geimhriú.
Ar Dhóigh An Phuifín: Míníonn Daidí gurb é an dóigh is fearr le réiteach a fháil ar fhadhb ná machnamh géar a dhéanamh sula mbuaileann tú faoi.
Diva is not happy, she has lost her watch! The gang try and calm her down and find it.
Double Vision: Reggie finds some dinosaur babies.
The presenter travels back in time to the era of the Triceratops, a plant-eating dinosaur which roamed the plains of North America.
Bo is tired and falls asleep in the middle of hunting for Fabio's lost inflatable fruit. It's up to Mojo to finish the job - without waking up poor, exhausted Bo!

Tugann Peppa agus George cúnamh do Grandpa Pig teachín éan a dhéanamh chun go bhfeicfidh siad ulchabhán san oíche.

programmes.show_name: Nina and the Neurons: Brilliant Bodies
programmes.show_description: Handy Hands: Felix the touch neuron helps Nina discover how hands work, and three young scientists learn the importance of opposable thumbs.
Mission: Rambler Badge: Dan and Jamie head for the hills to earn their compass badge searching for some missing ramblers and their teachers.
MeMo and BaBa are tidying up but can't find the right home for a squishy ball. There's room for everyone on Planet BeddyByes, eventually they find squishy ball's rightful place.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Madam Mist: Mist and fog cover the meadow. Tiny Toot and her friends go to visit dear old Madam Mist, who is brewing her swamp brew in a big cauldron.
The Anthill: Tiny Toot and her friends visit a big anthill.
Dad arrives with a cinema trip planned but Punky has swim lessons with Mum, Punky needs a plan fast.
Sleepytime: Mum reads bedtime stories to Bingo. Bingo tells her mom that she will wake up in her own bed the next morning, and she has a dream about a space adventure with Floppy.
Dylan wants to help a guest enjoy their stay at his hotel, but soon discovers that giving his guest a good night's sleep can be exhausting!
Dylan the Astronaut wants to walk on the moon, but when a shooting star gets pulled into a Black Hole the expedition turns into a rescue mission.
Daniel Tiger is curious about what it's like to be King. There's only one way to find out... King Friday makes Daniel 'King for the Day!'
Oxygen and the gang get creative as they attempt to paint an artistic mural on the wall of Atom Town, and they have LOTS of ideas!
Dee encourages a friend to say 'drum' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see and hear lots of different drums.
Grandmaster Glitch supersizes a fierce Komodo dragon, and the Go Jetters must find the sizeray to fix the glitch.
Mojo wonders which top would be perfect for digging up the bones of a Swoppitus Rex.
Tinies Soccer Club: Titus has built a soccer field, and Ollie couldn't be happier!
The little cabin: Fed up with following Bella's rules, Ollie asks Titus to build a little shack by the beach.

programmes.show_name: Lex and Plu Space Taxi Drivers
programmes.show_description: A Moon with a View: Lex and Plu start repairing their car and end up getting to their passenger late. Their passenger is the pig Galla.
The Good Choices Badge: The clubhouse is a mess. Roly wonders what will happen if he doesn't make good choices.
The Shopping Badge: It's Duggee's first time at the big shop. What glories await him in the middle aisle?
While playing skipping, Hugo discovers that there can be different ways to learning something new. (SL)
When Sonia accidently keeps painting outside her sheets of paper, she finds a way to finish her drawing that works for all. (SL)
Joe makes a trip to the hairdressers and meets Daisy who helps him overcome his fear of the hair razor. (SL)
Madam Mist: Mist and fog cover the meadow. Tiny Toot and her friends go to visit dear old Madam Mist, who is brewing her swamp brew in a big cauldron.
The Anthill: Tiny Toot and her friends visit a big anthill.
Dad arrives with a cinema trip planned but Punky has swim lessons with Mum, Punky needs a plan fast.
Planet Pop Beam: The friends travel into outer space to visit Planet Popbeam. Mae-Mae wonders if the planet is made of cheese, but Phoebe thinks it's made of rock.
Henry meets a dinosaur bone at the Natural History Museum. Dinosaur bone tells Henry all about the museum's most prized exhibit- a perfectly fossilised T-rex egg.
Bug Hotel: Stanley builds a lovely bug feeder for Fifi's new bug friend.
First Aid: Myrtle wants to practice her newly learned first aid skills!

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Chaos at Cronks Crossing: Traffic gets too busy at Cronk's Crossing, so construction of a new intersection begins.
When Dragon comes out of the lake after a refreshing dip, she is full of seaweed. Two passing rats don't recognize her and think she's a dangerous monster!
Brandon discovers a bee & asks Maggie & Brewster 'Why do Bees make a buzzing sound when they fly?' They head to the beehive where they meet the Queen Bee who explains.
Brewster slips on a globe and Hamish wonders 'Why does the world look flat?' The friends become astronauts and talk to the moon.
Tugann Peppa agus George cuairt ar Granny agus Grandpa. Tá Grandpa Pig ag déanamh Gairdín Cloch. Tugann na páistí cúnamh do Grandpa.
Tá na tuismitheoirí ag glanadh. Tugann siad aon rud nach bhfuil ag teastáil uathu chuig an siopa carthanais chun go mbeidh siad ag daoine eile.
Stíleasár: Tá Breacaí agus Peann Luaidhe i dTír na nGreamán, leathanach réamhstaire ina mbíonn dineasáir fhaiseanta ag dul in iomaíocht lena chéile ag comórtais stíle.
An Sean-Iarthar: Agus í ar cuairt ar leathanach an tSean-Iarthair, feiceann Breacaí póstaeir ar fud na háite lena samhail féin. Tá bulaí an bhaile, Micí Mór Mac Bia, sa tóir uirthi!
Bernie Agus an Bheach: Tá Bernie i gcruachás nuair a éiríonn beach sáinnithe ina phluais.
Faigh na hulchabháin: Tá cuidiú de dhíth ar Otto nuair a théann Pip agus Pop ar iarraidh.
Tallulah's back hurts again but her friends don't seem too sympathetic.
Silver Lining Stomping: On a hill overlooking the lake, Grace enjoys beautiful flowers, butterflies, and delicious berries. On the opposite side, Reggie is having a hard time catching a fish.
Presenter Andy Day travels back 220 million years and searches for a furry dog-like creature called a cynodont. He also looks for lichen, which the animal uses for bedding.
Mojo wonders which top would be perfect for digging up the bones of a Swoppitus Rex.

Baineann teaghlach Peppa an-sult as an gcrann úll atá acu i gcaitheamh na bliana - san earrach, sa samhradh, san fhómhar agus sa ngeimhreadh.
Téann Peppa agus an teaghlach ag siúl faoin tuath agus críochnaíonn siad ar deireadh thuas ar chnoc mór. Bíonn an radharc ag an mbarr go hálainn ar fad.

MeMo and BaBa notice a rainbow in the sky after it has been raining, but where does it end? They embark on a journey to find out and notice more rainbows all over Planet BeddyByes.
